S.FORM: Genzyuminrok iyikay Genzyuminrok iyikay, si say maha pyanga pinbawiq qa cintman na lhuyan Tayal. Mubuy ktalan binah Canpyuta 原住民族委員會
S.PHON: ɣenzjuminrok ijikaj ɣenzjuminrok ijikaj, s~ɕi s~ɕaj maħa pjaŋa pinβawiq qa ʦ~ʨintman na lħujan tajal. muβuj ktalan βinaħ ʦ~ʨanpjuta *******
S.FORM: Genzyuminrok iyikay Genzyuminrok iyikay, si say maha pyanga pinbawiq qa cintman na lhuyan Tayal. Mubuy ktalan binah Canpyuta 原住民族委員會
S.PHON: ɣenzjuminrok ijikaj ɣenzjuminrok ijikaj, s~ɕi s~ɕaj maħa pjaŋa pinβawiq qa ʦ~ʨintman na lħujan tajal. muβuj ktalan βinaħ ʦ~ʨanpjuta *******
